world.description: Iran warns Strait of Hormuz will “never return” to old state for US, Israel as tensions surge on war’s day 38.

world.title: Trump issues new threats to Iran over Strait of Hormuz closure
world.description: U.S. President Donald Trump has issued an expletive-filled threat to escalate strikes on Iran if it doesn’t open the Strait of Hormuz by his Tuesday deadline.

world.description: India's Jaishankar engages with Qatari and UAE leaders to address the West Asia crisis and ensure energy flow through Hormuz.

world.title: Thailand swelters as temperatures soar past 42°C with haze
world.description: BANGKOK: Thailand is set to experience widespread hot to extremely hot conditions through April 11, with temperatures in some areas expected to exceed 42°C, according to the Thai Meteorological Department.

business.title: Travellers flying out of Singapore allowed only 2 power banks from April 15; extras to be discarded
business.description: New ICAO rules limit Singapore travellers to two power banks in hand luggage from April 15 to reduce fire risks. Read more at straitstimes.com.

business.title: RBI MPC Poll: RBI likely to hold rates in April Policy, but FY27 commentary will be more watched
business.description: The April policy meeting is likely to see the RBI staying put on interest rates as the RBI shifts focus to the impact of the West Asia war

business.title: Endform: €1.5 Million Raised By Playwright Testing Platform To Accelerate End-To-End Test Execution
business.description: Endform, a developer tooling company focused on accelerating Playwright end-to-end testing, has raised €1.5 million in pre-seed funding to further build its parallel test execution platform. The round was led by Alliance VC, with participation from First Fellow, Greens, and Antler, alongside angel investors from Netlify, Wolt, Voi, and CTO Roundtable.

business.title: Paysend: $25 Million Follow-On Investment From Claret Capital To Scale Global Payments Platform
business.description: Claret Capital Partners announced a $25 million follow-on investment in Paysend to support the continued expansion of its global payments infrastructure and product suite. The funding builds on Claret’s initial investment in 2020 and reflects ongoing confidence in the company’s growth trajectory and international scale.

business.title: Sona: $45 Million Raised To Expand AI Platform For Frontline Workforce Operations
business.description: Sona, an AI platform focused on frontline and “real economy” businesses, has raised $45 million in a Series B funding round led by N47, with participation from Felicis, Northzone, Gradient, and Italian Founders Fund. This latest round brings the company’s total funding to over $100 million as it accelerates expansion in the United States and advances its AI-driven operational platform.

business.title: KKR/GIC delays Metro Pacific Health exit amid valuation gap
business.description: The delayed MPH stake sale reflects valuation pressure, though hospital expansion plans remain intact.

business.title: Korean company behind retina-based CVD risk AI plans to go public
business.description: Mediwhale has recently raised $13 million in Series C funding, which will also support its entry into the United States market.

business.title: Air passengers departing Singapore limited to two power banks each from Apr 15
business.description: Power banks must also not be charged on board the aircraft, says the Civil Aviation Authority of Singapore.

science.title: Artemis II is about to break a record that should never have been
science.description: Canada’s Jeremy Hansen and crewmates will travel farther from Earth than humans have ever gone, surpassing record set by the Apollo 13 crew

science.title: What to know about the Artemis 2 mission's Moon flyby
science.description: For the first time in more than half a century, astronauts will fly around the Moon on Monday, marking the high point of the Artemis 2's lunar mission.

science.title: JWST Spies Once-hidden Treasures in the W51 Starbirth Crèche
science.description: Star formation is a dramatic and complex process that erupts throughout the Universe. Yet, a lot of the action gets hidden by clouds of gas and dust. That's where observatories such as the James Webb Telescope JWST and the Atacama Large Millimeter Array (ALMA) come in handy. They use infrared light and radio waves, respectively, to pierce the veil surrounding the process of starbirth.

science.title: Scientists determine warmer waters cause greater stress on one of the ocean's most vital species
science.description: Research suggests that rising ocean temperatures are impacting zooplankton, which provide vital ecosystem services and are crucial for the food web.

science.title: Artemis astronauts for Moon flyby on fifth mission day
science.description: The four astronauts on NASA's Artemis 2 mission prepared to enter the Moon's "sphere of influence," having already taking in sights of the lunar surface never before seen by human eyes.

ai.title: 86% Indian employees report workplace disruption, upskilling demand rises
ai.description: AI is rapidly reshaping jobs in India, with four in five employees learning new skills to keep pace with workplace disruption. The ETS Human Progress Report 2026 highlights rising AI use, growing demand for verified credentials, and a strong shift toward continuous upskilling.

ai.title: 10 home names inspired by cultural symbols and their meanings
ai.description: Indian cultural symbols bear immense significance since they embody concepts which transcend worldly values. They range from ritualistic items, artistic representations, and architectural designs that embody concepts such as balance, prosperity, protection, and spirituality. Names associated with cultural symbols add an element of meaning and significance to your home since they embody values passed down from generation to generation. These names have more than aesthetic value since they encompass beliefs and traditions that have been practised over many years. Your choice will enable your home to reflect its rich cultural heritage, but at the same time, it is bound to embody time-tested values. PC: AI-Generated
